details.description: A narrow desert gorge with steep, stratified red sandstone walls and a soft, sandy wash forming the floor. The rock shows weathering, ledges, and small alcoves, with sparse desert shrubs along the base. The canyon bends gently, opening toward distant hills under a clear blue sky. Lighting indicates deep shade in the slot-like section with sunlit upper walls, characteristic of a red sandstone slot canyon popular with hikers.

details.description: A narrow desert canyon with tall red sandstone walls on both sides. The ground is a sandy trail with footprints, flanked by rugged, layered rock formations in warm reddish tones. The sky above is clear and deep blue, with sunlight highlighting the textures and casting shadows in the crevices. Sparse desert shrubs dot the canyon floor near the walls, suggesting a dry, arid environment.

details.description: A narrow desert canyon with high, stratified red-orange sandstone walls flanking a sandy wash. Footprints cover the soft sand. Sparse shrubs and a small tree grow along the base of the cliffs. The passage gently curves toward distant hills under a clear, deep-blue sky, with warm sunlight striking parts of the rock and cooler shadows in the slot-like sections.

details.description: A desert canyon scene featuring a narrow passage flanked by towering red sandstone cliffs. The rock walls display distinct stratified layers in warm orange-red tones. The ground is covered with fine sandy soil, with sparse desert shrubs along the edges and a bright blue sky overhead, suggesting a dry arid environment.

details.description: A ground-level perspective looking through a narrow desert canyon characterized by towering, rugged walls of deep red and orange sandstone. The rock faces display distinct horizontal stratification and erosion patterns typical of the region's geology. The canyon floor is a dry riverbed (wadi) covered in loose, reddish sand marked with numerous footprints, creating a winding path through the formation. On the right, the rock wall is illuminated by sunlight, revealing its rough texture and vibrant color, while the left wall lies in shadow, creating a strong contrast. In the middle distance, where the canyon walls appear to converge, a small, solitary acacia-like tree and some sparse scrub vegetation grow from the sandy base. The sky above is a cloudless, deep blue, contrasting sharply with the warm tones of the rock.

entities.name: Red Canyon (Sinai)
entities.notes: Also known locally as Salama Canyon or part of the Colored Canyon system; distinct from the Red Canyon in Eilat.

details.description: A vertical shot of a narrow canyon with towering, layered sandstone walls in shades of red, orange, and brown. The canyon floor is covered in fine, light-colored sand marked with numerous footprints. A clear, deep blue sky is visible above the canyon rim. Sparse desert vegetation, including small shrubs and a lone, leafless tree, is scattered along the path. The lighting creates a sharp contrast between the sunlit rock faces and the deep shadows within the crevices, highlighting the geological textures of the sedimentary rock.

entities.name: Colored Canyon
entities.notes: A narrow gorge in the Sinai Peninsula known for its vibrant, layered rock formations created by water and wind erosion.

details.description: A narrow desert canyon (wadi) with towering red/orange sandstone walls and a deep sandy floor covered in footprints. The rock faces show vertical jointing and weathered, blocky surfaces typical of arid sandstone gorges. Sparse desert shrubs cling to ledges and the wash; the sky is clear and intensely blue. The viewpoint is from within the canyon floor looking along the winding passage between high cliffs.

details.description: A narrow desert canyon with tall red sandstone walls on both sides. The rock faces display layered, rugged textures in warm orange-red hues. The canyon floor is a sandy, pebble-strewn wash with sparse desert vegetation along the base of the walls. A clear blue sky dominates the upper portion of the frame, suggesting a dry, sunlit day.

details.description: A narrow desert canyon with steep red sandstone walls and a sandy wash on the floor. The view looks forward along the canyon bottom, with tall, stratified rock faces and eroded textures on both sides. Footprints and small stones mark the soft sand, a few hardy desert shrubs cling to shaded ledges, and a leafless tree is silhouetted farther ahead. The sky above is clear and intensely blue, with strong contrast between sunlit and shaded rock, typical of arid canyon environments in the desert Southwest or similar landscapes.

details.description: A vivid desert canyon scene with tall red sandstone cliffs forming steep walls on either side. The left wall is illuminated in warm sunlight, revealing layered rock textures. The canyon floor is covered in pale sand and small pebbles, with sparse desert shrubs near the base of the walls. A clear, deep blue sky dominates the upper portion of the image, suggesting bright midday sun. The perspective appears to be from within the canyon, looking toward the narrowing passage ahead toward a lighter opening.

details.description: A view from inside a narrow desert canyon, characterized by towering, rugged walls of deep red and orange sandstone. The image is oriented sideways (rotated 90 degrees clockwise), with the sandy canyon floor appearing on the right side of the frame and the vertical rock walls extending to the left. When viewed in the correct orientation, the canyon features a soft, sandy path at the bottom, flanked by steep, weathered cliffs that narrow towards the top, framing a strip of clear blue sky. Sunlight illuminates the upper jagged edges of the rock, contrasting with the shadowed interior. Sparse vegetation, including a small tree or shrub, clings to a crevice in the rock face high above the ground. The geological texture and color are distinctively characteristic of the sandstone formations in southern Jordan.

details.description: A vertical view of a narrow sandstone canyon, known as a 'siq', with towering reddish-orange rock walls. The floor of the canyon is covered in fine, rippled sand. The rock faces exhibit distinct horizontal layering and weathered textures. A sliver of clear, deep blue sky is visible at the top between the converging cliff edges. Sparse desert shrubs are seen growing from crevices in the rock. The image is oriented vertically, showing the depth and height of the gorge.
